{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "95487e9f",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# 2.14 Get them all with MixedRoute"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2a15a97c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "> 💡 **Using this tutorial without the Qt GUI**\n",
    "> \n",
    "> This tutorial uses the desktop `MetalGUI`. To follow along on Colab, Binder, JupyterHub, or any environment where Qt isn't available, **replace any `gui.rebuild()` / `gui.screenshot()` call with `qm.view(design)`** — it renders the design to a matplotlib `Figure` you can display inline or save with `fig.savefig(...)`.\n",
    "> \n",
    "> See [1.4 Headless quick view](../1-Overview/1.4-Headless-quick-view-%28no-Qt-GUI%29.ipynb) for a complete runnable walkthrough and [`docs/headless-usage.rst`](../../docs/headless-usage.rst) for the full reference."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2f0540ca",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Creates 2 transmon pockets facing each other.\n",
    "\n",
    "Anchors are user-specified points through which the Routing must pass.\n",
    "\n",
    "Between anchors you can specify different connection algorythms."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "b52ab3bd",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "%reload_ext autoreload\n",
    "%autoreload 2"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "1c451f4a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "11:15PM 15s WARNING [_maybe_warn_lite_flip]: [FutureWarning] quantum-metal v0.7.0 will move PySide6, qdarkstyle, pyaedt, pyEPR-quantum, and gmsh out of base dependencies into opt-in extras. To preserve the current v0.6.x install behaviour, run `pip install 'quantum-metal[full]'` before upgrading. See ROADMAP.md and docs/migration-to-v0.7.0.rst for details. Set QISKIT_METAL_SUPPRESS_LITE_FLIP_WARNING=1 to silence.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from qiskit_metal import designs\n",
    "from qiskit_metal import MetalGUI, Dict\n",
    "\n",
    "design = designs.DesignPlanar()\n",
    "gui = MetalGUI(design)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "47719809",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# enable rebuild of the same component\n",
    "design.overwrite_enabled = True\n",
    "design.delete_all_components()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "e2773b3f",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "design.delete_all_components()  # needed only for rebuilds. will get a warning\n",
    "from qiskit_metal.qlibrary.qubits.transmon_pocket import TransmonPocket\n",
    "\n",
    "optionsQ = dict(\n",
    "    pad_width=\"425 um\",\n",
    "    pocket_height=\"650um\",\n",
    "    connection_pads=dict(  # pin connectors\n",
    "        a=dict(loc_W=+1, loc_H=+1),\n",
    "        b=dict(loc_W=-1, loc_H=+1, pad_height=\"30um\"),\n",
    "        c=dict(loc_W=+1, loc_H=-1, pad_width=\"200um\"),\n",
    "        d=dict(loc_W=-1, loc_H=-1, pad_height=\"50um\"),\n",
    "    ),\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "q0 = TransmonPocket(\n",
    "    design, \"Q0\", options=dict(pos_x=\"-5.0mm\", pos_y=\"0.0mm\", **optionsQ)\n",
    ")\n",
    "q1 = TransmonPocket(\n",
    "    design, \"Q1\", options=dict(pos_x=\"5.0mm\", pos_y=\"0.0mm\", **optionsQ)\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "gui.rebuild()\n",
    "gui.autoscale()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5b0eb655",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "#### Single CPW using one meander and 3 simple segments"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "44419116",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from qiskit_metal.qlibrary.tlines.mixed_path import RouteMixed\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from collections import OrderedDict\n",
    "\n",
    "ops = dict(fillet=\"90um\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "abc13d47",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "anchors = OrderedDict()\n",
    "anchors[0] = np.array([-3.0, 1.0])\n",
    "anchors[1] = np.array([0, 2])\n",
    "anchors[2] = np.array([3.0, 1])\n",
    "anchors[3] = np.array([4.0, 0.5])\n",
    "\n",
    "between_anchors = OrderedDict()  # S, M, PF\n",
    "between_anchors[0] = \"S\"\n",
    "between_anchors[1] = \"M\"\n",
    "between_anchors[2] = \"S\"\n",
    "between_anchors[3] = \"M\"\n",
    "between_anchors[4] = \"S\"\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsS = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsS[0] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[1] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[2] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[3] = [\"L\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[4] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsE = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsE[0] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[1] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[2] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[3] = [\"R\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[4] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "optionsR = {\n",
    "    \"pin_inputs\": {\n",
    "        \"start_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q0\", \"pin\": \"b\"},\n",
    "        \"end_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q1\", \"pin\": \"a\"},\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    \"total_length\": \"32mm\",\n",
    "    \"chip\": \"main\",\n",
    "    \"layer\": \"1\",\n",
    "    \"trace_width\": \"cpw_width\",\n",
    "    \"step_size\": \"0.25mm\",\n",
    "    \"anchors\": anchors,\n",
    "    \"between_anchors\": between_anchors,\n",
    "    \"advanced\": {\"avoid_collision\": \"true\"},\n",
    "    \"meander\": {\"spacing\": \"200um\", \"asymmetry\": \"0um\"},\n",
    "    \"snap\": \"true\",\n",
    "    \"lead\": {\n",
    "        \"start_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"end_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"start_jogged_extension\": jogsS,\n",
    "        \"end_jogged_extension\": jogsE,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    **ops,\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "qa = RouteMixed(design, \"line\", optionsR)\n",
    "\n",
    "gui.rebuild()\n",
    "gui.autoscale()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ddda14d2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "#### Single CPW using the pathfinder segments"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "d58ffe82",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "anchors = OrderedDict()\n",
    "anchors[0] = np.array([-3.0, -1.0])\n",
    "anchors[1] = np.array([0.2, -2])\n",
    "anchors[2] = np.array([3.0, -1.7])\n",
    "\n",
    "between_anchors = OrderedDict()  # S, M, PF\n",
    "between_anchors[0] = \"S\"\n",
    "between_anchors[1] = \"S\"\n",
    "between_anchors[2] = \"PF\"\n",
    "between_anchors[3] = \"S\"\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsS = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsS[0] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[1] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[2] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[3] = [\"R\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[4] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsE = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsE[0] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[1] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[2] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[3] = [\"L\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[4] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "optionsR = {\n",
    "    \"pin_inputs\": {\n",
    "        \"start_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q0\", \"pin\": \"d\"},\n",
    "        \"end_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q1\", \"pin\": \"c\"},\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    \"total_length\": \"22mm\",\n",
    "    \"chip\": \"main\",\n",
    "    \"layer\": \"1\",\n",
    "    \"trace_width\": \"cpw_width\",\n",
    "    \"step_size\": \"0.25mm\",\n",
    "    \"anchors\": anchors,\n",
    "    \"between_anchors\": between_anchors,\n",
    "    \"advanced\": {\"avoid_collision\": \"true\"},\n",
    "    \"meander\": {\"spacing\": \"200um\", \"asymmetry\": \"0um\"},\n",
    "    \"snap\": \"true\",\n",
    "    \"lead\": {\n",
    "        \"start_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"end_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"start_jogged_extension\": jogsS,\n",
    "        \"end_jogged_extension\": jogsE,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    **ops,\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "qb = RouteMixed(design, \"line2\", optionsR)\n",
    "\n",
    "gui.rebuild()\n",
    "gui.autoscale()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "9461a2ba",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# gui.screenshot()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "ba213ac2",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# create an obstacle\n",
    "TransmonPocket(design, options=dict(pos_x=\"1.0mm\", pos_y=\"-2.0mm\", **optionsQ))\n",
    "TransmonPocket(design, options=dict(pos_x=\"1.0mm\", pos_y=\"-1.0mm\", **optionsQ))\n",
    "TransmonPocket(design, options=dict(pos_x=\"-2.0mm\", pos_y=\"-1.0mm\", **optionsQ))\n",
    "\n",
    "gui.rebuild()\n",
    "gui.autoscale()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "d6910f71",
   "metadata": {},

      }

    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "gui.screenshot()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "ed287de5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "anchors = OrderedDict()\n",
    "anchors[0] = np.array([0.0, -1.5])\n",
    "\n",
    "between_anchors = OrderedDict()  # S, M, PF\n",
    "between_anchors[0] = \"S\"\n",
    "between_anchors[1] = \"PF\"\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsS = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsS[0] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[1] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[2] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsS[3] = [\"L\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "jogsE = OrderedDict()\n",
    "jogsE[0] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[1] = [\"L\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[2] = [\"R\", \"200um\"]\n",
    "jogsE[3] = [\"R\", \"500um\"]\n",
    "\n",
    "optionsR = {\n",
    "    \"pin_inputs\": {\n",
    "        \"start_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q0\", \"pin\": \"c\"},\n",
    "        \"end_pin\": {\"component\": \"Q1\", \"pin\": \"d\"},\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    \"total_length\": \"12mm\",\n",
    "    \"chip\": \"main\",\n",
    "    \"layer\": \"1\",\n",
    "    \"trace_width\": \"cpw_width\",\n",
    "    \"step_size\": \"0.25mm\",\n",
    "    \"anchors\": anchors,\n",
    "    \"between_anchors\": between_anchors,\n",
    "    \"advanced\": {\"avoid_collision\": \"true\"},\n",
    "    \"meander\": {\"spacing\": \"200um\", \"asymmetry\": \"0um\"},\n",
    "    \"snap\": \"true\",\n",
    "    \"lead\": {\n",
    "        \"start_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"end_straight\": \"0.3mm\",\n",
    "        \"start_jogged_extension\": jogsS,\n",
    "        \"end_jogged_extension\": jogsE,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    **ops,\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "qc = RouteMixed(design, \"line3\", optionsR)\n",
    "\n",
    "gui.rebuild()\n",
    "gui.autoscale()"
   ]
  },
